summary: Full backend + frontend regression for new 'Find My Shield' live-location share feature. Backend: 10 new pytest cases for share endpoints + 14 prior cases all green (24/24). Frontend: end-to-end flow verified — sender name persists to localStorage, SOS blocks without name/contacts, share modal opens with correct origin+token URL, Copy/Email/WhatsApp/per-contact-SMS buttons render & wire up, public /share/:token page renders Leaflet map with sender info & LIVE badge, location pings persist, Stop Sharing closes modal & deactivates session (public page flips to ENDED/Stopped), invalid token shows 'Share link not found'. No console errors.
critical_code_review_comments: ShareModal.jsx sendMail(): builds `const to = contacts.map(c => c.phone).join(',')` but never uses it in the mailto URL (line ~127). Either drop the dead variable or, since contacts only store phone (not email), consider asking for an optional email per contact later.
ShareModal.jsx sendSMS(): the ternary `const sep = ... ? '?' : '?'` always returns '?' regardless of branch — dead code, harmless but should be simplified.

ShareSession.token uses uuid4().hex[:10] (~40 bits). Acceptable for a short-lived stoppable session but consider using uuid4().hex (32 chars) or secrets.token_urlsafe(16) so URLs aren't easy to guess for someone who knows a session is live.

GET/POST /api/share/{token} has no rate limiting — a public 5-second poll is fine, but a malicious client could enumerate tokens; mitigate by combining higher-entropy tokens with a small per-IP rate limit.
ShareSession lacks a TTL/cleanup mechanism; stopped sessions live forever in MongoDB. Consider an index + TTL on stopped_at or a cron sweep.
Backend uses deprecated `@app.on_event('shutdown')`; migrate to FastAPI lifespan handlers (carryover from iter-1).
seed_data_creation: TEST_-prefixed contacts/share sessions are created during the run. Share sessions persist (no DELETE endpoint exposed); a few stopped TEST_* sessions will remain in db.share_sessions.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend pytest at /app/backend/tests/ now has two files: test_street_shield_api.py (8 endpoints, 14 cases) and test_share_api.py (4 share endpoints, 10 cases). Run together with `pytest /app/backend/tests/ -v`. Frontend testids of note for share flow: sender-name-input (localStorage key 'ss_sender_name'), sos-button, share-modal, share-url, share-copy-button, share-mail-button, share-whatsapp-button, share-sms-{contactId}, share-stop-button, share-modal-close, share-public-title, share-public-sender, share-public-last-ping. Public page lives at /share/:token. Note: Python stdout decoding can mangle the 🚨 emoji to %EF%BF%BD when printing URLs in playwright captures — actual JS source/clipboard/wa.me payload preserves the emoji correctly (verified by evaluating the JS literal in-browser).
rca of the issue: No issues found — all 24 backend tests + 11 frontend user flows pass.
